params.name: Mutated Pea
params.source: Pearrior fight from [[Altar#Relics and Gear|Dragon Wish "Give me something to eat"]].
params.description: This pea was enchanted by the Divine Dragon. Under special conditions, it could adapt to a combat form. Even if it's defeated, it would just dehydrate and shrivel up. Water it regularly and a miracle might happen someday!
params.ss1:
Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +1
Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
